title: Baklava (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Mix nuts with sugar and cinnamon.
Make syrup and pour hot over cold baklava.
Also added a dash of rose water.
Add a splash of lemon juice and a pinch of cardamom to the syrup.

source_review.text: Perfect baklava! Added a splash of lemon juice and a pinch of cardamom to the syrup. Also added a dash of rose water and topped with extra pistachios.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances the flavor profile of the baklava with additional aromatic ingredients.

changes_made.to_text: Add a splash of lemon juice and a pinch of cardamom to the syrup.
Also added a dash of rose water.

source_review.text: Used walnuts instead of pistachios. Added extra cinnamon and a pinch of clove. Served with vanilla ice cream.

modifications_applied.reasoning: User preferred walnuts over pistachios for a different flavor profile.

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: Enhances the flavor profile of the baklava with additional aromatic ingredients.; User preferred walnuts over pistachios for a different flavor profile.
